examples: At recess Tom continued his flirtation with Amy with jubilant self-satisfaction.
She was aware of his attempts at flirtation.
Frank's efforts at flirtation had become tiresome to her.
But the texture of Theresa's improbable flirtation with this septuagenarian rake is depressingly innocent.
However, the current flirtation with Dow 12, 000 seems to be taking on some additional significance.
